since_last: 37% of 84 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.23%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 37% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.42% · BTC -0.38% · Gold -0.06% · Nasdaq100 -1.70%. 37% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.23%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.23%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -4.98%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at -10.64%
cards.body: Leaders: NET +8.83%, WDAY +3.85%, IBM +3.62%, PLTR +3.55%, CRM +3.47%. Laggards: TER -10.64%, AMBA -10.46%, INTC -10.29%, MRVL -8.99%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -6.00% at $150.79
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -6.00% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
